steps.title: Spot the explanatory relationship
steps.content: The first clause introduces a concept: “The visual magnitude scale is reverse logarithmic.” The second clause must clarify what that concept means. The transition needs to signal this clarification.

steps.title: Apply the clarifying transition
steps.content: ”In other words” directly fits because it indicates the next clause will clarify what “reverse logarithmic” means. The other choices suggest similarity, opposition, or a specific example, which don't fit. That matches choice C — C is correct.
